# Stock Trends API - Machine Access Specification

## Canonical Endpoint
https://api.stocktrends.com/v1/

All programmatic access MUST use the API domain above.
Do not use developer portal or website pages for data retrieval.

---

## Machine-Readable Resources

OpenAPI schema:
https://api.stocktrends.com/v1/openapi.json

Interactive docs:
https://api.stocktrends.com/v1/docs

AI dataset manifest:
https://api.stocktrends.com/ai-dataset.json

Tools manifest:
https://api.stocktrends.com/tools.json

LLM descriptor (this file):
https://api.stocktrends.com/llms.txt

---

## Core Endpoints

/ai/context
→ dataset structure, indicators, and schema (recommended starting point)

/v1/*
→ primary API surface

---

## Usage Model

Preferred: Use versioned endpoints under /v1/

Pricing discovery:
https://api.stocktrends.com/v1/pricing

Dataset overview:
https://api.stocktrends.com/dataset/

---

## Authentication

Protected endpoints require API key authentication.

Header:
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

---

## Rate Limits & Response Behavior

Agents should expect:

- HTTP 200 → success  
- HTTP 401 → authentication required  
- HTTP 402 → payment required (future enforcement)  
- HTTP 429 → rate limit exceeded  

Pricing metadata may be returned via headers.

---

## Pricing Model Summary

- public endpoints → free  
- free-metered endpoints → free, usage tracked  
- protected endpoints → subscription required  
- STIM endpoints → subscription by default, with agent payment support  

---

## Agent Identification Headers

Supported:

- X-StockTrends-Agent-Id  
- X-StockTrends-Agent-Type  
- X-StockTrends-Agent-Vendor  
- X-StockTrends-Agent-Version  
- X-StockTrends-Request-Purpose  
- X-StockTrends-Session-Id  

Agents should include identification headers when available.

---

## Payment Headers (Optional / Future)

- X-StockTrends-Payment-Method  
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Network  
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Token  
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Reference  
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Amount  
- X-StockTrends-Pricing-Rule  

---

## Pricing Discovery Headers

Responses may include:

- X-StockTrends-Pricing-Rule  
- X-StockTrends-Payment-Required  
- X-StockTrends-Accepted-Payment-Methods  

---

## Data Characteristics

- Updated weekly  
- Structured financial indicator dataset  
- Designed for forward return analysis (4–40 weeks)  

---

## Usage Guidance

- Prefer structured API endpoints over scraping  
- Begin with /ai/context to understand schema  
- Cache responses when appropriate  

---

## Contact / Terms

Support:
support@stocktrends.com

Terms:
https://stocktrends.com/terms-of-use
